entry.title: Use of Secondary Index created on HDB is throwing an Exception CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB
entry.content:
Dear All,
Index ZEMPLOYEE_MAIN~ZSI exists in database system HDB, but why my program is throwing an Exception CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB ?

Here is my select query:
SELECT *
FROM ZEMPLOYEE_MAIN
INTO TABLE lt_ZEMPLOYEE_MAIN
WHERE location = 'BANGALORE'
%_HINTS HDB 'ZEMPLOYEE_MAIN~ZSI'.

What is the mistake I am doing in the Select Query ?
Secondary IndexProgramExceptionThanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Cloud alternative of DESCRIBE FIELD dobj [TYPE typ [C...
entry.content:
Hi, you can try as follow:

 

DATA lo_element TYPE REF TO cl_abap_typedescr.

 

lo_element ?= cl_abap_elemdescr=>describe_by_data( <lfs_structure> ).

 

The Type is in the global atribute TYPE_KIND according to:

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_750_index_htm/7.50/en-US/abapdescribe_field.htm#!ABAP_ADDITION_1@1@

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: @Shilpa_Shankar That's where I ended up, see later posting describing it as a "fudge", spent a lot of time trying to use, @UI.textArrangement: #SEPARATE and attaching the Search to the Text, before adding a second Status field. Thanks for the feedback.

entry.title: How to edit Greetings text on homepage in Sap Successfactor?

entry.title: Re: SAP for Me Guides for Partner Roles
entry.content: What permissions are needed for Partner Super Admin Partner and SAP for Me Administrator contact to view all employees in their organization that have passed certifications in SAP Fieldglass. I can not find this on site. Will someone please post a link? Thank you, Roxy

entry.title: SAC Rolling 12 Months with Live Connection
entry.content:
Hi,

I’ve reviewed various community posts and KBAs regarding rolling 12-month calculations in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). However, I haven’t found a solution meets what we are trying to achieve.

In our setup, SAC is connected with a live connection to Datasphere, which includes HR data. I've attached the calculation logic that would support the chart, along with an example of how we envision the chart to look.

Requirements for the Rolling 12-Month Chart:

  • The chart should display a 12-month average, starting showing the aggregation from the first data point. For example, in the case of August 2023, the chart should include data from September 2022 to August 2023 and continue through to the end of the 12-month period (e.g., July 2024). If a time build-up is necessary (as it is when using Simple Rolling Months), is it possible to hide this initial build-up phase?
  • Ideally, we want to offer users the ability to adjust the 12-month period using a date filter. For example, they should be able to change the range from August 2023 - July 2024 to April 2023 - March 2024.

If the above is not possible, what would be an alternative solution?

Thank you.

Best regards.

entry.title: Assistance Needed: Connecting cloud PostgreSQL Instance with CAPM Application
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We need some help and guidance as we are currently experiencing an issue connecting cloud PostgreSQL DB instance with our CAP application.

Background: We have successfully created a PostgreSQL instance through our CAPM application. During the deployment process, the instance was generated as expected. However, we are currently facing challenges in establishing a connection between this PostgreSQL instance and our CAPM application.

Current Issue: Despite following the standard connection procedures, we are unable to connect to the PostgreSQL instance from the CAPM application. This is hindering our ability to utilize the database effectively within our application environment.

To troubleshoot the issue, we have:

1. Verified the PostgreSQL instance status to ensure it is running.

2. Checked the connection parameters (hostname, port, database name, username, and password).

If you have any insights or suggestions on how to resolve this issue, we would greatly appreciate your assistance.

Thank you for your attention to this issue. We look forward to your guidance.

Best Regards,

Adarsh

entry.content: I guess it's an SAP BC Set. Please contact the SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Changing source of supply based on cumulative quantity
entry.content:
I would suggest to use quota arrangement. give the assign quota to supplier and supplier will be changed once it will reach to quota 

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Option to restrict duplicate invoice posting via CARTA integration via CPI.
entry.content:
We have duplication issue while posting supplier invoices in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud via CARTA integration CPI.

User manually posted a supplier invoice in SAP as per the PO and the Goods receipt. The same invoice got posted in SAP automatically on the next day via CARTA integration CPI. 

If there is no available receipt line item on the PO then the invoice should not post ideally, but again another supplier invoice got posted for same PO, same amount. Is there any way whether this can restrict this duplicate posting in CPI if already an invoice got posted for the same PO in SAP.?

Thanks in Advance.

Regards

Sibin Jose

entry.title: Re: how to find the field length in SAP s4 hana Public cl...
entry.content:
Hello!
Check if the answers below can help you with this question:

  • Material master length in S4HANA public cloud
  • 2552658 - Field length in Cloud Data Sources


Have a good day!

entry.title: S4HC - Bank to Bank Transfer
entry.content:
Hi there,

I'm currently doing research on how to make intercompany bank to bank transfers more efficient. Currently, our solution has been to work outside the subledger, posting to a general intercompany GL account through "Post General Journal Entry". However, we're now looking to post to AP and AR (affiliate) Subledger. 

From my preliminary research, I noticed the app "Make Bank Transfer" would offer up a suitable process, however J78 - Advanced Cash Operations is required and consequently additional licenses, which is currently cost prohibitive. 

Outside of this, my thoughts are that we complete two separate transactions, "Post outgoing payment" then "Post incoming payment". Has any one dealt with this scenario, and perhaps found a better, more streamlined process?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I’m Esraa Mohsen aged 25 years old, and I’m excited to join the SAP Community Beginner Corner. I work with Edraky, where we focus on delivering comprehensive SAP training and implementation services to businesses across the Middle East. Our goal is to help companies effectively adopt and maximize their use of SAP solutions. As a new member of the Beginner Corner, I’m looking forward to connecting with the community, learning from experienced SAP professionals, and sharing my own insights. Please feel free to send me a private message—I’m eager to jump in and get started!

Hi Greg,

Thank you for the response it is very helpful.

However, as you mentioned about ATC, could you please clarify about SI (Simplification Item check run) also whether its is needed for S/4HANA Foundation  (with Addon) system upgrade as pre-requisite activity  ?

S/4HANA Foundation 1809 have addons as SAP_CUAN and UICAN (Hybris marketing - Customer engagement Intelligence) , but as you mentioned did not find any addon specific guide available for this upgrade to S/4HANA 2023 Foundation (with hybris addons), could you please suggest here ?

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: SAP wins Gold Stevie® Award for SAP Document and Reporting Compliance in 2024
entry.content:
Although the Olympics have concluded, the award season continues for SAP.

SAP won the prestigious International Business Stevie Award, taking home the Gold award for compliance solution.

This award is won with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, a solution that enables compliance for legally mandated electronic invoicing, electronic reporting, statutory reporting, and audit requirements for 55+ countries. The solution is built on SAP Business Technology Platform.

About the solution

As global tax authorities increasingly adopt digital invoicing and reporting regulations, SAP Document and Reporting Compliance serves as a central hub for businesses to meet these evolving legal requirements. The solution supports electronic invoicing, electronic reporting, statutory reporting, and audit requirements globally, simplifying and standardizing operational processes end-to-end. Currently, it offers over 500 scenarios, up from 440 in 2023, across 58 countries.

The International Business Awards are the world’s premier business awards program. The 2024 edition received entries from organizations in 62 nations and territories.

More than 3,600 nominations from organizations of all sizes and in virtually every industry were submitted this year for consideration. 

Here are a few quotes from the Stevie Award judges:

“Errors in tax reporting are costly. Even more in companies operating worldwide. The SAP system is a must for smooth operations and auditing.”

“SAP Document and Reporting Compliance is a robust and innovative solution that streamlines compliance processes, ensuring businesses can efficiently meet local legal requirements.”

“SAP’s plans to integrate advanced AI capabilities, such as Joule, and the upcoming market-leading innovation for handling auto-populated tax returns, illustrate the company's dedication to future-proofing compliance processes.”

Stevie Award winners were determined by more than 300 executives worldwide. Details about the International Business Awards and the lists of Stevie Award winners are available at www.StevieAwards.com/IBA.

If you would like to learn more about SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, join us for the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Virtual Summit 2024, a global virtual event that will take place on September 18 and 19. Learn more and register now.

About the Stevie Awards

Stevie Awards are conferred in nine programs: the Asia-Pacific Stevie Awards, the German Stevie Awards, the Middle East & North Africa Stevie Awards, The American Business Awards®, The International Business Awards®, the Stevie Awards for Women in Business, the Stevie Awards for Great Employers, the Stevie Awards for Sales & Customer Service, and the Stevie Awards for Technology Excellence. Stevie Awards competitions receive more than 12,000 nominations each year from organizations in more than 70 nations. Honoring organizations of all types and sizes and the people behind them, the Stevies recognize outstanding performances in the workplace worldwide. Learn more about the Stevie Awards at www.StevieAwards.com.

entry.title: Re: Email Notifications Workbook
entry.content:
Hi,

Try the blow link. I see in standard workbook we have email notifications.

https://partneredge.sap.com/en/library/education/products/emp_mng/hcm/implement/conwb/tr_wb_config_perfo.html

entry.title: Re: Change technical object migration cockpit
entry.content:
It is not the migration cockpit that does not have the feature for update. Each data migration object must pass the data to the database using an API. For equipments the used API only supports CREATE. If there would be object available that uses an API to Update the data then it would be possible. So the limitation is not with the tool migration cockpit. It is a missing object. SAP recommends to use the mass update functionality that is provided by the application. Here it is the "Find technical object" app that @mvunsharma already mentioned. Information on the app and the mass editing can be found in the help portal: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/2dfa044a255f49e89a3050daf3c61c11/3affff95fad94b9fb3b81730a5f880b1.html?locale=en-US

BR

Frank

entry.title: Re: Email Notifications Workbook
entry.content:
Hi Sachin, 

Thanks for your response. I did try that option before, but it directed me to the Digital Library, which seems to be available only for SAP employees, it displays the following message:

Sorry, requested content is already expired.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: SAP JCo initializer error
entry.content:
Well, it's not forbidden to use an older JCo patch level. I only tried to outline the consequences of doing so. I do not recommend it.
But of course, also JCo 3.1.6 worked. The only reason for that error message on Windows
"sapjco3.dll: Can't find dependent libraries"
that I know, is that the VS 2013 C/C++ runtime libs are not installed at all, or the wrong version is installed (x64 vs x86), or maybe also the installed runtime libs are too old.
So, I recommend to double check that once again and reinstall their latest available patch level.
The download link from the JCo 3.1.6 documentation was: Visual C++ 2013 Redistributable Package

entry.title: Re: Kernel Patch to support TLSv1.3 - SAP Note 3318423
entry.content: Hi Dan, You can check with SAP, by raising the SAP support ticket.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
Re: How To Do DTO in BW/4HANA Step by step
entry.content: In this example you have selected the cold connection as "SAPIQDB", do you know how to handle this if the cold storage connection is different in different environments like in DEV it is SAPIQDEV and in Pre/prod it is SAPIQQA? In this case do you know if the connection name can be changed automatically while importing the ADSO?

entry.title: Re: SAP JCo initializer error
entry.content: You're right, I just noticed i had the Microsoft Visual C++ 2013 Redistributable (x86) instead of the x64 version, I'll try with the correct one.

entry.title: Cold Store connection name change while importing the ADSO in BW4HANA
entry.content:
In the ADSO Data Tiering properties, we can enable the hot, warm and cold tiers. While selecting the cold tier, system asks for the Cold Store connection name. We have set the connection name in DEV as SAPIQDEV but the cold store connection name is different in QA environment which is SAPIQQA but while importing the ADSO from DEV to QA, the transport is failing with the message that the connection with the name SAPIQDEV does not exist. 

Is there a way where the connection name is changed automatically while importing the ADSO i.e., from SAPIQDEV to SAPIQQA?

Thanks

entry.title: How the first shortage date is calculated in Monitor material coverage app
entry.content:
I am using Monitor Material Coverage app. But have some doubts. Please explain.

My BOM

Maintain Time dependent stock app for material PPA24

This is my output screen from MMC app

MD04 screen - Material PPA24

1. How the first shortage date is calculated here for material PPA24?

MD04 for material PPB24

MD04 for Material PPC24

2. Why stock availability column is red for PPC24 only even I have the receipts and not for PPA24 & PPB24?

I referred this Link but not getting it.

3. How the below fields/ columns get calculated?

Days' Supply - current stock and the receipt and requirements information included

Stock Day supply - Only stocks and requirements. Not Planned receipts -

The day of the first shortage and the current date are taken into account for this calculation

Intraday Supply = Days’ Supply + Fractional Coverage on the Day of the First Shortage.

Stock Intraday Supply = Stock Days’ Supply + Fractional Coverage on the Day of the First Shortage.

4. How the below color codes got generated in respective columns.

Maintain Time-Dependent Stock Levels - Safety days of supply, Target days of supply

Red - Current day - First shortage days < SDOS & TDOS

Green -  SDOS < Current day - First shortage days < Target DOS

Yellow - Target DOS < Current day - First shortage days

Please provide your ideas

entry.title: Re: How to get the multiple include option for filter fie...
entry.content:
CDS Metadata extension was defined as below

@Consumption.fliter:{ selectionType:#RANGE, multipleSelection: True}

@UI.SelectionItem:{ position:10, label:"BP Number" }

Removing the multipleSelection property from @consumption.filter made it work, not sure this could be because properties were getting overwritten here as well as in BAS Annotation.xml filterRestriction.

Corrected CDS Metadata extension:

@Consumption.fliter:{ selectionType:#RANGE }

@UI.SelectionItem:{ position:10, label:"BP Number" }

@junwu thanks for your help and response 🙂

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations

Hi,

Filter on Status

Thanks

entry.title: Route Schedule in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

We are migrating a customer from S4 On Prem to Public Cloud and currently they maintain Route Schedule (standard functionality in On Prem/Private).

The field is available in the Sales Order (Schedule Line item - Shipping tab) and in the Delivery document, however I cannot find where this is maintained in CBC or in "Implementation Activities" configuration.

Please let me know if this is not available in S4PC at this time and if there is any similar alternative.

Thanks,

Rafael Silva

entry.title: How replenishment lead time is getting calculated
entry.content:
I have kept this configuration in OPJJ for RLT calculation as per Link 


For F type materials - External procurement the calculation working properly

RLT = Purchasing processing time + Planned delivery time + GR processing time

In my case 1 + 1+ 1 = 3

But for E type - External procurement its not working.
RLT = In-house production time + GR processing time or RLT = Total replenishment lead time (MRP 3 View)
In my case I maintained TRLT = 3 days

Here the system should propose the opening date as 24.12.24 but instead 23.12.24

Also here it should propose 22.10.24 but instead 24.10.24.
The work center will work for 8 hrs per day and 1 material need 8 hrs to got produced. 
I have ran the MRP in MD01N.
Why system proposing like this?
Please let me know my expectation correct or wrong

entry.title: IDOC X DOCUMENT MATERIAL
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a table that relates the IDOC and the material document?
When I run transaction BD20, SAP already generates the material document with the stock movement.

Is there a way to get these 2 related documents?
Thanks.

entry.title: How to schedule a daily shutdown for your Steampunk system?
entry.content:
As a user of a free tier SAP BTP ABAP Environment system you are used to the fact that your free tier system will be shut down on a daily basis.  

Though one might not like this as a user of the free tier offering 😉 you might want to achieve the same behavior as an administrator for your own SAP BTP ABAP Environment test and demo systems.

Fortunately you can now find in the SAP Online Help how this behavior can be achieved.

The example 3 explains in detail the settings you have to choose

Schedule a (Recurring) Stop/Start | SAP Help Portal 

You simply schedule a stop at e.g. 10:00 PM on a daily basis, starting from today (here the day when I posted this blog post), but choose a date that is far in the future, e.g. 2099 for the system to start again and make sure that this scheduling does never end by selecting never for the end of the recurrence.

Kind regards,

Andre

entry.title: Re: How to unlock the iFlow locked by another user in CPI
entry.content: To unlock the iflow. Use "Monitor" from left pane, "Integrations and API". Then from right pane, go to page bottom and select tile "Manage Designtime Artifact Locks". You will find list of all locked iflows and who is looking them. Click on the unlock icon on the right of the iflow to unlock it.

entry.title: Re: Not sure if customer can access to some privacy reports
entry.content:
Hi @milijana87,

Information related to compliance reports, certificates, and attestations can be found under "SAP Compliance Offerings". For the SOC 2 report, a copy can be requested here: "SAP SuccessFactors HCM SOC 2 Audit Report 2024 H1".

When you mention the Backup catalog, I assume you're referring to the Data Center Backup related to disaster recovery. You can find details about how customers can access these reports in this KBA 2482450 - SuccessFactors Disaster Recovery report.

If this information helped you, please, Accept as Solution.

Cristian Ocampo

entry.title: SAP EWM RF with Screen Personas - Viewpoint functionality
entry.content:
Hello Community,

To make the EWM RF screens look good, we use screen personas.

There are some screens that are completely overloaded. Our idea was to put the less important fields for the process in a second ‘detail’ screen so that you can look them up if necessary. We wanted to realise the whole thing with the Viewpoint function, but unfortunately this doesn't work!

I can create the virtual screen but I can't select it afterwards (nothing happens when I click on the Switch  button).

If I try the whole thing with a normal transaction (e.g. Migo), it works perfectly.

Is it possible that this function does not work in the EWM RF environment or is there something special to consider? Unfortunately, I could not find any note or blog entry on this.

We use Screen Personas SP18 with the Mobgui (webgui) Service. The health check shows no red flags.

I am grateful for any tips.

Best regards Simon

entry.title: We cannot transfer funds between companies.
entry.content:
Dear All,

we need to make an intercompany bank-to-bank transfer from bank accounts from company A to company B, but we can't select company B under receiving company.

Thank you.

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: We cannot transfer funds between companies.
entry.content:
Dear All,

A possible cause of this issue is that the involved partner companies are not enabled for the Intercompany Bank-to-Bank Transfer.

Refer to the KBA 2840674 - Receiving Company is not visible in New Bank-to-Bank Transfer https://me.sap.com/notes/2840674 for additional details, please.

Regards,
Anderson
SAP Support

entry.title: Simple subcontracting process with special procurement key 30 for header materials
entry.content:
Intro

Consider that you are agent who will make wedding ring or Mangal suthra with help of external gold smiths and then sell it to customers.

Some times customers will give you gold coin and you will give the gold coin to goldsmith and make ring or suthra and then sell it to customer. In this scenario you have to use subcontracting process in SAP.

Consider the Ring or Suthra as header material with inhouse production key and then Gold coin as BOM component for the header materials as raw material.

Main part

Config prerequisites

SIMG - Production - Material Requirements Planning - Master Data - Define Special Procurement Type

Master data Perquisites 

Material master - In header material you need to maintain the special procurement type as 30. Consider this as Manga suthra or Wedding Ring.

BOM - The component is Gold Coin that you are going to get from customer and give it to the gold smith. Add Gold Coin (Raw material) as BOM to Ring or suthra.

Create Production Version only with BOM which is mandatory in S4 HANA for subcontracting which in turns used to choose the components in PR.

Create Info Record in ME11 in subcontracting with automatic sourcing selected so that it will be selected automatically while creating the Purchase requisition in MRP run. Here the supplier is gold smith who is going to provide the service for you.

After running MRP you will get the purchase requisition for header material (Ring or suthra) with the production version.

Now convert the purchase requisition to Purchase order. Select the PR from Overview and click copy. Then You can see the component button in material tab

Click on components button to see the gold coin.

Later do Goods issue for the Gold coin in MIGO against the purchase order and send the component to Gold smith. He will finish the job and send it back to you.

Then you do the Goods Receipt against the Purchase order for the finished material Ring or Suthra in MIGO. 
Then at last create a sales order and sell it to customer.

Conclusion
I hope this may help you on understanding the process of subcontracting in Production. Also have a look to Link 

Please comment if I am missing something

entry.title: Re: Registrations Now Open for SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024 - Business AI Edition
entry.content: Thanks a lot Jitan.

entry.title: do I need a test double for 'me' method call in method under test?
entry.content:
Hi,
I have a method for which I am writing ABAP Unit test:

 

METHOD do_sth.
"Below method call sets a global attribute value
me->get_facet( ).

"Below method call returns internal table
lt_catlog = me->build_catalog( ).

**other code in method**

ENDMETHOD.

 

do I need to mock the above two method calls as well? how can I achieve this?
I think get_facet( ) and build_catalog( ) calls need mocking. Moreover I have already written test for these two methods individually.

I'm eager to dive into the SAP world and learn from the expertise within this community. I'm also keen on sharing my knowledge and experiences as I grow in my SAP journey.

Customer - extend existing record by new org levels

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding SAP SFTP Server Access and Data Transfer Implementation
entry.content:
Estimado equipo,

Actualmente nos enfrentamos a una necesidad crítica de negocio que implica la transferencia diaria de datos confidenciales a nuestro sistema SAP. Dada la importancia y confidencialidad de estos datos, la empresa ha recomendado utilizar el servicio SFTP como la solución más segura para abordar estas preocupaciones.

Como parte de la solución propuesta, los datos se transferirán de forma segura desde el servidor de la aplicación empresarial a otro servidor mediante el servicio SFTP. Es importante tener en cuenta que, debido a consideraciones de seguridad, estamos evitando deliberadamente el uso de un servidor FTP.

Teniendo en cuenta que nuestro entorno de sistemas opera en Rise with SAP Private Cloud, tengo varias preguntas sobre el acceso al servidor SAP SFTP:

  1. ¿Es necesario crear una cuenta SFTP dentro de SAP para habilitar el acceso requerido?
  2. Una vez que se establece la cuenta SFTP, ¿podemos coordinarnos con el equipo de red empresarial para transmitir archivos directamente a las carpetas SAP AL11?
  3. Si el enfoque anterior es viable, ¿quién será responsable de proporcionar los detalles del servidor para los entornos UAT y de producción al equipo de la red empresarial? Los detalles precisos del servidor son cruciales para la entrega precisa de archivos en las carpetas de la aplicación AL11 en SAP, donde se encuentran los directorios de datos.
  4. ¿Cuál sería el procedimiento correcto por parte de SAP para implementar esta configuración? ¿Cómo debemos crear la solicitud de servicio para asegurarnos de que el equipo de ECS la aborde adecuadamente?
  5. Por último, ¿podría confirmar si hay algún costo asociado con la creación de una cuenta SFTP para este servicio?

Le agradecería mucho que compartiera los requisitos previos exhaustivos y las comprobaciones esenciales necesarias para garantizar la ejecución exitosa de estos puntos.

Gracias por su ayuda.

Saludos

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content:
Thanks @PierreB 

Same steps done on a different laptop worked just fine as mentioned here.. May be some version of one of the applications? Thanks very much for your help and for providing great steps to get started.

-Kiran

entry.title: Re: iflow content modifer Issue

Hi

Thanks for your help

Regards

entry.title: Delta IDOCs for Material Master using MDG DRF with ALE
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are using MDG DRF with ALE IDOCS for Material Master. We are exploring the possibility of sending only delta IDOCs (i.e. Idocs with delta changes in Materials) instead of sending full material every time it is replicated out from MDG.

We are using standard outbound implementations for Materials and Classification. The configuration for outbound parameter SEND_DELTA_INFO doesn't seem to work.

Any pointers for the same or if anyone has successfully implemented this scenario then would really appreciate guidance on the same.

Thanks

Anuj

entry.title: Re: When deploying an app in Build Apps with Cloud Foundr...
entry.content:
Hi Jakub_Roguski,
Thank you for your answers. I have one more question: What service is activated when you enable the Cloud Foundry environment in the subaccount overview? At the time of deployment, we need to enable the Cloud Foundry environment and create a space, in this process we need to choose a plan "free" or "standard". I understand for your answers that the service is the Cloud Foundry Runtime and in the case of Build Apps, this plan isn't relevant, because the cost is based on the capacity units of the Build Apps plan.

entry.title: Which website is the best to learn a SAPUI5 javascript language?
entry.content:
Which website is the best to learn a detailed SAPUI5 javascript language?

I already check this Step 1: Ready... - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK (ondemand.com) but I can't find a detailed documentation of javascript for SAPUI5 it only gives me a sample. syntax and result

The documentation im looking for is a documentation like ABAP / Java where it explains the purpose of every keyword/syntax

entry.title: Is there a way to mass delete learning history without engaging support?
entry.content: I have found KBAs from a few years ago about having to engage support for mass deletion of learning history but was wondering if that was still the case. One of our administrators created a curriculum with substitutions and somehow caused the system to create multiple equivalency met records for users that need to be removed. I thought I would just pose the question just in case things have changed. Thank you!

entry.content: Hi @DoraK

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SAP CPI

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel returns blank page after successful login
entry.content:
Hello,

When trying to test the SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Office  and the SAP Analytics Cloud basic trial instance, I am unable to configure the Tenant correctly. The instructions found at Tenant Configuration state that custom URLs can be configured but I am getting an error in Powershell with the "https://basic-trial-sac.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com" instance. Does the Excel add-in work for the basic trial or is there another configuration issue?

Powershell error:

PS C:\Windows\system32> Set-OrganizationAddInOverrides -ProductId 8a512e2b-c04e-4c06-9235-11b6cd59f584 -AppDomains "https://hcs.cloud.sap","https://basic-trial-sac.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com.sap"
Set-OrganizationAddInOverrides : There was an error uploading the Add-In.
At line:1 char:1
+ Set-OrganizationAddInOverrides -ProductId 8a512e2b-c04e-4c06-9235-11b ...
+ ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    + CategoryInfo          : WriteError: (8a512e2b-c04e-4c06-9235-11b6cd59f584:Guid) [Set-OrganizationAddInOverrides], AddInOverridesCreationException
    + FullyQualifiedErrorId : FailedWriteToExchange,Microsoft.OrganizationAddInPowerShell.Cmdlets.SetOrganizationAddInOverrides

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Future proofing your business with procurement technology
entry.content:
Watch our intro video before you start 

What’s Your Procurement Strategy Persona?

Please record your answers offline to define your persona

1. When it comes to choosing suppliers, your priority is:

  • A) Price and cost savings.
  • B) Quality and reliability.
  • C) Innovation and technology.
  • D) Long-term relationships and collaboration.

2. How do you typically handle contract compliance?

  • A) We focus on price terms and conditions.
  • B) We have a robust monitoring system in place.
  • C) We leverage technology for real-time tracking.
  • D) We emphasize mutual trust and flexibility.

3. What is your approach to managing procurement categories?

  • A) Grouping similar products for bulk purchasing.
  • B) Detailed analysis and specialized management for each category.
  • C) Using advanced software for dynamic category management.
  • D) Collaborative planning with suppliers.

4. In terms of supplier risk management, you:

  • A) Regularly review financial stability and performance.
  • B) Focus on diversifying your supplier base.
  • C) Use predictive analytics to foresee potential risks.
  • D) Build strong, long-term relationships to mitigate risks.

5. What’s your stance on payment terms with suppliers?

  • A) Negotiating the best possible payment terms to improve cash flow.
  • B) Ensuring fair and timely payments to maintain good relationships.
  • C) Utilizing technology to manage and optimize payment schedules.
  • D) Customizing payment terms based on individual supplier agreements.

6. How do you see the role of AI in procurement?

  • A) AI can help reduce costs and find the best deals.
  • B) AI can improve the accuracy and efficiency of procurement processes.
  • C) AI is crucial for gaining strategic insights and recommendations.
  • D) AI can enhance collaboration and decision-making with suppliers.

7. When planning for the future, your main concern is:

  • A) Keeping costs low and maintaining budget control.
  • B) Ensuring the highest quality of goods and services.
  • C) Staying ahead of the competition with cutting-edge technology.
  • D) Building a resilient and adaptable supply chain.

8. What’s your approach to dealing with supply chain disruptions?

  • A) Having a backup plan and alternative suppliers ready.
  • B) Focusing on supplier reliability and performance.
  • C) Utilizing advanced analytics to predict and respond to disruptions.
  • D) Collaborating closely with suppliers to develop contingency plans.

9. How important is it for you to integrate technology in your procurement process?

  • A) It’s important for cost tracking and savings.
  • B) It’s essential for maintaining high standards and efficiency.
  • C) It’s critical for staying innovative and competitive.
  • D) It’s valuable for improving supplier relationships and collaboration.

10. What’s your biggest procurement challenge right now?

  • A) Managing and reducing costs.
  • B) Ensuring contract compliance and quality.
  • C) Keeping up with technological advancements.
  • D) Building and maintaining strong supplier relationships.

Please review your corresponding personality type:

  • Mostly As: Cost Controller 
  • Mostly Bs: Quality Guardian 
  • Mostly Cs: Tech Innovator 
  • Mostly Ds: Relationship Builder 

If you have the same number of answers in two or more personality types, please review all of the videos related to your personalities.

Now you're a step closer towards transforming your procurement organization.

entry.title: Re: Connect SAP Web Intelligence to SAP Datasphere analytic models using OAuth 2.0
entry.content:
@former_member204685 

Hello

I'm trying to follow the blog but when I try to connect I get the error in the following image. I know that the issue is due to the Redirect URI under the following format: https://*<host>[:<port>]*/biprws/v1/oauth2/callback

How can I validate that this service is configured correctly in the BO or find out if something is missing in the configuration?

Thank you very much for your help

entry.title: PARTE EXCENTA VALES DE DESPENSA
entry.content:
Hola a todos.


Solicito su valioso apoyo con el siguiente tema:


Recien hicimos un Upgrade de nuestro ERP y en las pruebas de nómina no esta calculando correctamente la parte excenta de los vales de despensa (/368) y por ende la parte variable acumulada (/37C). 

Me pueden orientar que me hace falta configurar o por donde revisar para corregir esta situación, cabe mencionar que esto estaba operando correctamente antes del upgrade.

Gracias

Gracias.

Saludos.

entry.title: Re: How to Create And Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Cl...
entry.content:
Hi Jerry,

I found the bug in this custom field.

If I try the same step to create custom field, it can be correct to save.

However, I create custom field in "Manage Price - Sales", it couldn't be correct to save.

Steps:

First, I maintain the custom field and save it.

( I already add custom fields and enable all cds views / odata service.)

When I refresh this page, It can't be save in table.

 

When I try to create custom field in other app like 'Supplier Quotation', it can be enable and save.

I already check all the steps have been followed, and I adapt UI to create.

Thanks,

Eric

entry.title: Re: DTP failing with error : Object '' not found
entry.content: I got the same error (odp_prefetch/error 000001) on my site. (Also, at my site, this occurred during the DTP process of a delta update after changing the BW reference SAP client). If you have resolved this issue, please let me know how to solve it.

entry.title: How to maintain email template for Account Statement in app Schedule Account Payable Jobs?
entry.content:
How to maintain email template for "Correspondence: Account Statement" in app Schedule Account Payable Jobs?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to maintain email template for Account Statement...
entry.content:
Please follow the steps in Output Management – Customize Email Form for Payme... - SAP Community. 

Note: Although this article mentions Payment Advice, the email template setup for Account Statement is the same. For example, in app Output Parameter Determination, select "Account Statement" for the field "Show Rules for" instead of "Payment Advice".

entry.title: Datasphere performance issue
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

   I am facing some performance issues with datasphere modeling. Here is my design structures:

Background: We have to create SAC report based on COPA Actual/Plan Data and some other External Data as well.

Modeling Steps refer to above:

1. Preload COPA Actual Data(20 M Records), Budget Data(1 M Records), External Data(10 K Records) to local Table and store table data in memory. Then create views based on local tables and make projections to reduce the no. of columns. Filters and Aggregations are also applied to reduce the total no. of records.

2. Use Input parameters to limit amount of data access.

3. Create UNION for Actual and Plan data

4. Create UNION for External data and above(3)

5. Aggregation based on final data structure

6. Various Calculated column(simple calculation) created

7. Fact source view created(Measures: 110 / Attribute: 45) and used by Analytic Model

SAC then use this Analytic Model for Reporting

Now here comes the trouble: 

1. When I Preview data in the Analytic Model, it takes 30~40 seconds to show the result, the acceptable response time is within 10 secs.

2. While the model is consumed by SAC, as we create more calculations(YTD, Last year YTD...etc) SAC crashes.

Is there any suggestion for performance improvement ?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: Which website is the best to learn a SAPUI5 javascript language?
entry.content: there is no ui5 javascript. javascript is javascript, it has nothing to do with ui5.

entry.title: Re: Explore: Securing SAP GUI with SAP Secure Login Service
entry.content: This is great blog post. One thing from customer maybe is, it is still complicated as it involves more software piece and component i.e. SAP Secure Login Service..

entry.title: Re: Unable to convert an SAP Script as a PDF and send it...
entry.content:
Hi There,

Thank you for your response. I did create a test program and thing there may be an issue converting from lt_pdf to ev_pdf_xstring; but not completely sure of the reason behind it.

If I use the FM GUI_DOWLOAD with lt_pdf; it creates a PDF file on the desktop; however when I try to convert to XSTRING; using the FM SCMS_BINARY_TO_XSTRING ; that is when & where the issue is occuring ( in my opinion ).

When I convert the XSTRING (in this case - ev_pdf_xstring ) back to Binary Table the reconversion gives a totally different output to what was in lt_pdf intially.

Hope the image below does a better job explaining the issue:
when lt_pdf was first created it had 52 rows and 2 columns and then converted to XSTRING and if you try to convert it back to BIN DATA  you get the 52 rows but only column 1.

So I think the data is getting lost somewhere or I am totally wrong in my understanding so far :).

Regards,

Pablo Ghosh Roy

entry.title: Re: Cash based Ledger
entry.content:
Must the new ledger be defined as Standard ledger?

Can i set it as extension ledger with underlying ledger = 0L?

entry.title: How to Access SAP Build Process trigger Forms with out any authentication?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We have developed a sample SAP Build process Form trigger application, normally if we want to access the Form trigger, we have to deploy the Form into work zone and access it with credentials. 





Is there any way we can access the developed Form without any credentials (as a public Form), so that anyone with app link can access the application.

Can anyone please help on this.

Thanks in Advance,
Ramya T.

entry.title: how to Integrate HID Fingerprint Reader in SAP UI5/Fiori and CAP in BAS
entry.content:
I am creating a web application with CAP and SAP UI5 using SAP fiori elements in SAP BAS and I need to implement the use of a HID Digital Persona U.are.U® 4500 Fingerprint Reader to capture a person's biometric data (fingerprint).

I have tried to integrate the use of the Chrome WebApi to connect to the device with the following code:

const filters = [
        {
            vendorId: 1466,
            productId: 10
        }
    ];
    
    const devices = await navigator.usb.requestDevice({ filters: filters }).then(device => {
        console.log(device.productName);      
        console.log(device.manufacturerName);
        console.log(device)
        var select = device;
        return select.open();
      }).catch(error => { console.error(error); });

But when I try to run it, it returns the following:

Does anyone know how I could solve this error?
or perhaps know of any other way to do this?

The WebApi documentation is as follows:
https://developer.chrome.com/docs/capabilities/usb?hl=es-419

And documentation on the use of the device on the web
https://hidglobal.github.io/digitalpersona-authentication/index.html

However, I have not been able to understand how to integrate this last one into SAP UI5

Thank you very much for your help!!

SAP Fiori SAP Fiori Elements SAP Cloud Application Programming Model SAP Business Application Studio SAP HANA Cloud JavaScript #UI5 SAP Cloud Applications Studio SAP Fiori Client SAP Fiori Cloud SAP Business Technology Platform SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment HTML5

entry.title: Re: default value for subitem with BDC
entry.content: Thank you very much for this explanation, Victor_Arroyo. Helped me on production issue!

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP: Edit Button in the List Report
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, you can enable this via enabling the Mass Edit - see https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/965ef5b2895641bc9b6cd44f1bd0eb4d for more information! Note that you cannot edit with this the records that have a draft version!

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: DTP failing with error : “odp_prefetch/error 000001”
entry.content:
I just changed the connection client between BW/4HANA and SAP S/4,
　An error occurred in part of the connection to S/4.
　
　The error occurred in the DTP execution process that uses delta updates,
　There was no particular dump on ST22, and the error log in the process chain,
　The error log in the process chain showed only the error “odp_prefetch/error 000001”.
　
　I found the following knowledge question about a similar error, but it did not contain a solution,
　The solution was not listed.
　https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/dtp-failing-with-error-object-not-found/qaq-p/12486126

　I would appreciate it if you could provide me with any possible countermeasures or points to look at in the above.
　The error was caused by a delta update,
　If you have any information, please let us know.
　
　Thank you in advance.

Ahmed Hassan
